## SSS1 Mathematics Scheme of Work — Term 1
**Curriculum Board:** NERDC | **Education Level:** SSS1 | **Duration:** 13 Weeks

### Learning Objectives
Students will:
- Define algebraic expressions and identify variables, constants, and coefficients
- Apply basic algebraic operations (addition, subtraction, multiplication, division) to simplify expressions
- Solve linear equations with one unknown using inverse operations

---

| Week | Topic | Sub-topic | Learning Objectives | Activities | Assessment |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Week 1 | Introduction to Algebra | Variables, constants, expressions | Define algebraic terms; identify components | Teacher introduces algebra using market pricing examples (₦ per kg of garri); students label expressions | Oral Q&A on definitions |
| Week 2 | Algebraic Expressions | Simplifying like terms | Simplify algebraic expressions by combining like terms | Pair work: simplify 5 expressions; peer marking | Short quiz (5 questions) |
| Week 3 | Algebraic Expressions | Expanding brackets | Apply the distributive law to expand brackets | Worked examples on board; group competition — who can expand fastest | Exit ticket |
| Week 4 | Equations | Solving linear equations | Solve one-step and two-step linear equations | Emeka and Ngozi 'balance-scale' activity; physical balance metaphor | Written exercise |
| Week 5 | Equations | Word problems | Translate word problems to equations and solve | Tunde has ₦450 after spending ₦x on transport — class solves together | Problem-solving worksheet |
| 6–7 | Geometry | Angles and lines | Identify and calculate angles at a point, on a line, and in triangles | Protractor activities; measuring angles around Balogun Market-style junction diagrams | Practical assessment |
| Week 8 | Geometry | Triangles | Apply angle sum properties of triangles | Group investigation: do all triangles have angle sum 180°? | Group report |
| 9–10 | Number Theory | LCM and HCF | Calculate LCM and HCF using prime factorisation | Prime factorisation tree diagrams; LCM story problems using sharing of farm produce | Written test |
| Week 11 | Statistics | Data collection | Collect, organise, and present data in frequency tables | Class survey: daily transport cost of students in ₦; frequency table construction | Peer review |
| Week 12 | Statistics | Charts and graphs | Construct bar charts and pie charts from frequency tables | Graph paper activity; present findings to class | Poster display |
| Week 13 | Revision & Assessment | All Term 1 topics | Recall and apply all Term 1 concepts | Past WAEC/NECO questions review; group quizzes | End-of-term examination |
reference: NERDC SSS1 Mathematics Scheme of Work for Term 1 covering Algebra, Geometry, Number Theory, and Statistics with 13-week structure.
subject: mathematics
